visualStyles.label: Normal
visualStyles.intent: Balanced default with clean hierarchy and broad commercial adaptability.

composition.heroLayout: Split hero with one dominant message and one support media area.
composition.gridSystem: Balanced 2-column or 12-column grid without forced asymmetry.
composition.sectionRhythm: Even cadence with one emphasis shift every 2 sections.
composition.hierarchy: Clear headline > support copy > CTA > proof.
composition.cards: Medium-sized cards with stable spacing and moderate contrast.
composition.density: Medium density, easy scanning, no crowding.
composition.backgrounds: Layered gradients or soft shells without heavy effects.
composition.responsive: Predictable stacking with minimal layout drama on mobile.

visualStyles.label: Minimalista
visualStyles.intent: Reduced noise, editorial clarity, and generous negative space.

composition.heroLayout: Clean split hero with restrained copy and quiet media.
composition.gridSystem: Simple split or narrow editorial column with wide breathing room.
composition.sectionRhythm: Longer pauses between sections and fewer but larger modules.
composition.hierarchy: Few emphatic elements with sober typography and sharp priorities.
composition.cards: Large, sparse cards with strong padding and little ornament.
composition.density: Low density with visible air around every block.
composition.backgrounds: Soft tonal fields, light texture, low-effect surfaces.
composition.responsive: Collapse to a calm single-column flow without stacked clutter.

visualStyles.label: Glassmorphism
visualStyles.intent: Layered translucent surfaces, controlled blur, and subtle glow depth.

composition.heroLayout: Floating-panel hero with foreground cards crossing the media field.
composition.gridSystem: Layered grid with overlapping panels and controlled offsets.
composition.sectionRhythm: Depth shifts between sections through opacity and panel elevation.
composition.hierarchy: Primary message anchored by luminous panels and contrast islands.
composition.cards: Translucent cards, soft borders, stacked depth, minimal hard blocks.
composition.density: Medium density with visual depth replacing extra content.
composition.backgrounds: Blurred gradients, glows, glass shells, and atmospheric layering.
composition.responsive: Remove risky overlaps on mobile and keep only shallow depth cues.

visualStyles.label: Bento
visualStyles.intent: Modular, dashboard-like composition with irregular grid balance.

composition.heroLayout: Hero embedded into a modular canvas with adjacent feature tiles.
composition.gridSystem: Irregular bento grid with varied spans and card proportions.
composition.sectionRhythm: Fast modular rhythm with deliberate size changes between cards.
composition.hierarchy: Large anchor tile plus supporting utility and metric tiles.
composition.cards: Mixed card sizes, dashboard logic, strong module identity.
composition.density: Medium-high density, but with strict grouping and legibility.
composition.backgrounds: Structured shells, subtle layers, grid-led composition.
composition.responsive: Irregular desktop grid becomes 2-column then 1-column without micro-cards.

visualStyles.label: Editorial
visualStyles.intent: Asymmetric narrative layout driven by typography, image rhythm, and contrast.

composition.heroLayout: Asymmetric hero with dominant headline and offset media.
composition.gridSystem: Editorial columns with uneven spans and intentional imbalance.
composition.sectionRhythm: Narrative pacing with bold shifts between dense and airy sections.
composition.hierarchy: Typography-first with image acting as dramatic support.
composition.cards: Few cards, often taller or offset, integrated into the narrative flow.
composition.density: Medium density with contrast between quiet and assertive moments.
composition.backgrounds: Large fields, typographic whitespace, expressive framing.
composition.responsive: Preserve headline drama on mobile while reducing asymmetry safely.

visualStyles.label: Immersive
visualStyles.intent: Cinematic composition with dominant hero media and fewer, larger sections.

composition.heroLayout: Large visual hero with overlays, short copy, and suspended CTA.
composition.gridSystem: Big scene blocks rather than repeated standard sections.
composition.sectionRhythm: Slow cinematic rhythm with less fragmentation and more impact.
composition.hierarchy: Visual-first with message and action layered on top.
composition.cards: Large statement cards or panels, not small repetitive blocks.
composition.density: Low density, high impact, few elements per viewport.
composition.backgrounds: Cinematic gradients, dark overlays, atmospheric media shells.
composition.responsive: Keep the visual scene but simplify overlays and text grouping on mobile.

visualStyles.label: SaaS Modern UI
visualStyles.intent: Product-led, structured, conversion-focused, and cleanly scalable.

composition.heroLayout: Product-first split hero with proof cards and interface previews.
composition.gridSystem: Structured 12-column layout mixing proof, feature, and metric modules.
composition.sectionRhythm: Alternates product explanation, proof, workflow, and CTA moments.
composition.hierarchy: Headline, product preview, trust metrics, and next step are all explicit.
composition.cards: Functional product cards, metric cards, and utility blocks with high clarity.
composition.density: Medium density optimized for fast scanning and conversion.
composition.backgrounds: Controlled gradients, dark shells, and polished UI framing.
composition.responsive: Product, copy, and proof stack in a stable order without crushed columns.

visualStyles.label: Minimal Business
visualStyles.intent: Executive, sober, legible, and high-trust business presentation.

composition.heroLayout: Measured split hero with strong business statement and compact proof.
composition.gridSystem: Disciplined business grid with restrained asymmetry.
composition.sectionRhythm: Stable and formal spacing, avoiding visual noise.
composition.hierarchy: Authority first, then service clarity, then proof and contact.
composition.cards: Rectilinear, sober cards with firm spacing and minimal styling.
composition.density: Medium-low density with trust and legibility over spectacle.
composition.backgrounds: Quiet surfaces, subtle gradients, executive polish.
composition.responsive: Compact and highly readable on mobile without secondary ornament.

visualStyles.label: Web visual con imagenes grandes
visualStyles.intent: Large-media-first composition with editorial hierarchy and strong image presence.

composition.heroLayout: Media-dominant hero with copy framing the image rather than competing with it.
composition.gridSystem: Wide visual panels with fewer narrow text columns.
composition.sectionRhythm: Large visual beats interrupted by smaller informational moments.
composition.hierarchy: Image first, then headline, then selective supporting copy.
composition.cards: Image-led cards with short labels and compact metadata.
composition.density: Low-medium density with generous media breathing room.
composition.backgrounds: Image-driven shells, layered overlays, subtle editorial gradients.
composition.responsive: Crop and reorder media carefully so mobile still feels visual, not chaotic.

visualStyles.label: Interactive Motion UI
visualStyles.intent: Highly current, dynamic UI with intentional motion and clear conversion paths.

composition.heroLayout: Dynamic hero with layered motion targets and clear focus path.
composition.gridSystem: Flexible system that supports moving panels, reveals, and transitions.
composition.sectionRhythm: Frequent but controlled rhythm changes guided by motion cues.
composition.hierarchy: Motion supports hierarchy instead of replacing it.
composition.cards: Cards designed for reveal, hover, or step-based interaction.
composition.density: Medium density with breathing room for motion and focus.
composition.backgrounds: Layered gradients, soft depth, and movement-aware surfaces.
composition.responsive: Motion softens on mobile while structure remains clear and performant.

composition.heroLayout: Monumental hero with reduced copy and deliberate visual restraint.
composition.gridSystem: Large spans, few modules, and careful proportion control.
composition.sectionRhythm: Slow premium rhythm with high-value whitespace.
composition.hierarchy: Authority and desirability before detail density.
composition.cards: Large premium cards, often fewer per section, with material emphasis.
composition.density: Low density with focus on perceived value.
composition.backgrounds: Deep tones, subtle shine, refined gradients, tactile surfaces.
composition.responsive: Keep premium calm on mobile by reducing secondary chrome.

composition.heroLayout: Command-center hero with interface fragments, stats, or tech panels.
composition.gridSystem: Structured system grid with panels, rails, and data emphasis.
composition.sectionRhythm: Fast and precise cadence with frequent proof and system references.
composition.hierarchy: Product/system, benefits, proof, and action in a tight loop.
composition.cards: High-contrast utility cards and system modules.
composition.density: Medium-high density while maintaining strict grouping.
composition.backgrounds: Dark technical gradients, grid hints, focused glow accents.
composition.responsive: Technical density compresses into stacked utility sections without overflow.

visualStyles.label: Espacial
visualStyles.intent: Atmospheric, futuristic, and expansive without harming clarity.

composition.heroLayout: Deep-scene hero with distant glow, large negative space, and floating content.
composition.gridSystem: Asymmetric but sparse layout with orbit-like spacing.
composition.sectionRhythm: Long atmospheric pauses with occasional concentrated content clusters.
composition.hierarchy: Message emerges from the atmosphere, supported by selective anchors.
composition.cards: Floating panels and isolated proof cards.
composition.density: Low-medium density, prioritizing immersion over volume.
composition.backgrounds: Cosmic gradients, halos, glow fields, and layered atmospherics.
composition.responsive: Atmosphere remains, but empty space is reduced and content grouped tightly.

visualStyles.label: Moderno
visualStyles.intent: Current, fluid, commercially polished, and versatile.

composition.heroLayout: Contemporary hero with strong CTA path and flexible media framing.
composition.gridSystem: Fluid modern grid with moderate asymmetry and varied card sizes.
composition.sectionRhythm: Alternates denser sections with lighter CTA or proof sections.
composition.hierarchy: Commercial clarity with modern pacing and balanced emphasis.
composition.cards: Rounded, commercial, versatile cards with current polish.
composition.backgrounds: Gradient fields, subtle shapes, polished shells.
composition.responsive: Comfortable collapse preserving conversion priority and visual freshness.

visualStyles.label: Editor
visualStyles.intent: Curated, typographic, magazine-like, and compositionally refined.

composition.heroLayout: Split or stacked editorial hero with curated type and art direction.
composition.gridSystem: Magazine-inspired composition with curated cards and image slots.
composition.sectionRhythm: Alternates editorial spreads, captions, and compact proof blocks.
composition.hierarchy: Type and image share authorship in a curated rhythm.
composition.cards: Captioned cards, tall media blocks, and curated content modules.
composition.density: Medium density with controlled visual styling.
composition.backgrounds: Editorial color fields, texture hints, and framing accents.
composition.responsive: Keeps editorial identity but normalizes risky offsets on mobile.

visualStyles.label: Premium
visualStyles.intent: Elevated, rich, polished, and intentionally high-value.

composition.heroLayout: Showcase hero with premium surfaces and strong proof anchor.
composition.gridSystem: Rich modular grid balancing desirability and clarity.
composition.sectionRhythm: High-low rhythm with statement sections and restrained utility sections.
composition.hierarchy: Desire, proof, and action sequenced with visible polish.
composition.cards: Rich premium cards with depth, material contrast, and clean spacing.
composition.density: Medium density with visible polish and stronger surfaces.
composition.backgrounds: Premium gradients, controlled reflections, and layered panels.
composition.responsive: Strips non-essential luxury chrome before compromising readability.

composition.heroLayout: Utility-first hero with clear offer, proof, and direct next step.
composition.gridSystem: Practical grid with aligned cards and straightforward section logic.
composition.sectionRhythm: Fast business rhythm with little decorative pause.
composition.hierarchy: Offer, credibility, process, and CTA remain constantly legible.
composition.cards: Functional cards with low ornament and strong labels.
composition.responsive: Highly stable mobile stacking with no ornamental overlap.

visualStyles.label: 3D
visualStyles.intent: Dimensional, layered, and depth-aware without harming UX.

composition.heroLayout: Depth-led hero with object or panel layering around the main message.
composition.gridSystem: Layer-friendly layout with foreground and midground modules.
composition.sectionRhythm: Depth moments alternate with flatter readability sections.
composition.hierarchy: Depth supports focus instead of scattering attention.
composition.cards: Volume-aware cards with lighting or object cues.
composition.density: Medium density with spatial separation doing some of the work.
composition.backgrounds: Perspective gradients, depth shadows, and object framing.
composition.responsive: 3D cues simplify on mobile to avoid clutter and performance loss.

composition.heroLayout: Arcade-like hero with strong blocks, labels, and intentional nostalgia.
composition.gridSystem: Chunkier grid with card logic that supports retro modularity.
composition.sectionRhythm: Punchy, rhythmic, and more segmented than premium/editorial styles.
composition.hierarchy: Headline, action, and modular proof remain loud and clear.
composition.cards: Pixel-framed cards, strong labels, and obvious module boundaries.
composition.density: Medium density with visually chunkier grouping.
composition.backgrounds: Retro grids, dither-inspired tones, and stylized contrast.
composition.responsive: Retro framing remains, but spacing expands enough to stay readable.

layoutModes.label: Soft shell
layoutModes.intent: Framed but not heavy. Default safe mode.

layoutModes.label: Sin bloques
layoutModes.intent: Lighter framing, softer surfaces, still ordered.

layoutModes.label: Mixto
layoutModes.intent: Curated mix of framed and fluid sections.
